title: hieracium murorum subsp. pyroloides
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. pyroloides is a subspecies of the Hawkweed plant, specifically a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Hieracium murorum subsp. pyroloides include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and support immune function. Hierbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it's essential to note that more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safe use.
